# AI Mention You

> AI visibility checker and GEO tracker. Monitor whether ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews mention your brand — and improve your citations across every major LLM.

AI Mention You scans your domain across major AI assistants, scores how often it's cited, surfaces missed-mention opportunities, and generates an action plan (content, schema, FAQs) to improve visibility. Built for SaaS, ecommerce, and agencies.

## Pages

- [Home — AI Visibility Checker](/): Free instant scan of your AI visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.
- [Tools](/tools): 24 free AI/SEO tools — rank trackers, prompt generators, schema, FAQs, content audits.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Pro ($19), Team ($49), Agency ($149/mo).
- [Blog](/blog): Guides on AI visibility, GEO, AEO, and AI search optimization.
- [About](/about): Mission and team behind AI Mention You.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach support at hello@aimentionyou.com.
- [Integrations](/integrations): Slack and Zapier webhooks for visibility alerts.

## AI Rank Trackers

- [Perplexity Rank Tracker](/tools/perplexity-rank-tracker): Track citations in Perplexity AI.
- [ChatGPT Mention Tracker](/tools/chatgpt-mention-tracker): Monitor mentions in ChatGPT.
- [Claude Rank Tracker](/tools/claude-rank-tracker): Track visibility in Anthropic's Claude.
- [Google AI Overviews Tracker](/tools/ai-overviews-tracker): Monitor Google AI Overviews and AI Mode.
- [Copilot Rank Tracker](/tools/copilot-rank-tracker): Track Microsoft Copilot and Bing AI.
- [LLM Rank Tracker](/tools/llm-rank-tracker): Multi-platform AI rank tracking.

## Optimization Tools

- [GEO Optimization Checker](/tools/geo-optimization-checker): Score your generative engine optimization.
- [LLM Readiness Score](/tools/llm-readiness-score): Audit how AI-friendly your site is.
- [AI Citation Tracker](/tools/ai-citation-tracker): See where AI cites your domain.
- [Brand Monitor](/tools/brand-monitor): Track brand mentions across AI platforms.
- [Competitor Analyzer](/tools/competitor-analyzer): Compare AI visibility vs rivals.
- [Content Auditor](/tools/content-auditor): Audit content for AI visibility gaps.
- [Schema Generator](/tools/schema-generator): Generate JSON-LD for AI and SEO.
- [Meta Optimizer](/tools/meta-optimizer): Optimize titles and descriptions.

## Generators

- [AI Prompt Generator](/tools/ai-prompt-generator): Surface customer search queries.
- [AI FAQ Generator](/tools/ai-faq-generator): Schema-ready FAQ blocks.
- [AI Answer Generator](/tools/ai-answer-generator): Citation-optimized content.
- [AI Blog Outline](/tools/ai-blog-outline): SEO-ready outlines.
- [AI Email Generator](/tools/ai-email-generator): Professional email drafts.
- [Title Generator](/tools/title-generator) and [Description Generator](/tools/description-generator): Meta tag copy.
